relocation.package_summary: ElevenLabs offers relocation assistance primarily for moves to their NYC office, including potential visa support for international hires, but specifics on movers or temp housing are not detailed publicly; appears case-by-case for US domestic relocations from Seattle.
relocation.policy_notes: ElevenLabs relocation policy not found in accessible sources. Recommend: (1) Check company careers page or Lever posting directly; (2) Contact recruiter for specifics on lump-sum vs. broker model, tax treatment, and equity cliff terms.

benefits.meals_provided: Snacks and beverages in-office; no full meals specified.
benefits.other_perks: The company offers a remote-first work environment, a discretionary annual stipend for professional development, a social travel stipend to meet with colleagues, and annual company offsites.

sentiment.blind_score: 4.2/5 + Positive on fast growth and AI innovation, some concerns on work-life balance in recent threads.
sentiment.glassdoor_score: 4.2 overall rating. Key themes from reviews highlight the company's market-leading AI voice technology and the high caliber of the team. However, there are recurring concerns about an extreme workload, with 60-70+ hour weeks being common, and a work-life balance rating of 3.6/5. Some reviews also mention that compensation can be below market for the intensity of the work.
sentiment.reddit_pulse: A Reddit thread from August 2025 describes the environment as very startup-like, with high ownership and a lot of work, but also significant freedom and impact. The engineers are noted to be of a high caliber, many from FAANG backgrounds. Another thread from February 2026 includes a comment from a user whose developer friend got a job at ElevenLabs, expressing mixed feelings due to the company's impact on the voiceover industry.
sentiment.x_pulse: Founder @piotrzemla posts about team expansions and culture events (Apr 2026); execs highlight low attrition and hiring for AI roles positively.

likely_recruiter.name: unknown
likely_recruiter.rationale: Search LinkedIn for 'ElevenLabs recruiter' + filter by roles mentioning 'Forward Deployed Engineer' or 'Engineering Recruiting'; cross-check with Lever job posting to identify posted-by contact.

likely_hiring_manager.name: unknown
likely_hiring_manager.rationale: Check ElevenLabs org chart (LinkedIn company page → 'See all employees' → filter by 'Engineering' + recent hires in 2025–2026); Forward Deployed Engineer typically reports to VP Engineering, Solutions, or Product. Recommend searching 'ElevenLabs' + 'Forward Deployed' on LinkedIn to surface recent role postings with hiring manager attribution.

comp_corroboration.leveling_evidence: Levels.fyi median Software Engineer £110K in UK (P25 £100K, P75 £120K approx from breakdowns) https://www.levels.fyi/companies/elevenlabs/salaries/software-engineer; no US-specific data for Forward Deployed Engineer
comp_corroboration.agreement_with_council: LOW - council provided no specific comp details to compare, and searches yielded no corroborating data on total comp, pre-IPO equity, or RSU for the role in 2026

benefits_corroboration.401k_signal: Glassdoor review mentions 401k as part of competitive benefits package https://www.glassdoor.com/Benefits/ElevenLabs-US-Benefits-EI_IE9081894.0,10_IL.11,13_IN1.htm
benefits_corroboration.healthcare_signal: Glassdoor review cites good health insurance https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Employee-Review-ElevenLabs-E9081894-RVW88612326.htm
benefits_corroboration.agreement_with_council: MEDIUM - aligns with positive benefits themes in council Glassdoor summary, but no new details on relocation or specifics

sentiment_corroboration.blind_recent_posts: no Blind evidence found for last 90 days
sentiment_corroboration.x_team_signal: Positive hiring and growth signals; e.g., Aneri (@0xAneri) post Mar 2026: 'Not surprised to see @ElevenLabs featured on this list of the most talent dense companies. And we’re hiring!'
sentiment_corroboration.reddit_signal: no relevant threads found in r/cscareerquestions, r/ExperiencedDevs, or r/MachineLearning for 2026
sentiment_corroboration.biggest_green_flag_in_socials: Rapid growth to $500M ARR mentioned in X post by Justine Moore (@venturetwins) May 2026: 'They grew from $350 million ARR at the end of 2025 to $500 million at the end of May'
sentiment_corroboration.agreement_with_council: MEDIUM - social signals reinforce positive growth and innovation but lack depth on WLB concerns or toxicity to fully align with council's 4.2/5 and 3/5 grades

people_corroboration.named_employees_posting: Aneri (@0xAneri, PM) posting about hiring Mar-May 2026; Matthieu (@matt_elevenlabs, Community Growth) engaging on events May 2026
people_corroboration.hiring_team_visibility: MEDIUM — leadership and team members like Aneri post regularly on X about hiring and culture, but no high-volume presence from execs
people_corroboration.recommended_outreach_target: Aneri (@0xAneri) — active in hiring posts and has strong network from prior roles at Coinbase/Meta, making her high-leverage for warm outreach on engineering roles
